title: From Al-Fatiha to An-Nas: The Central Theme of Every Surah
description: A draft exploring the central theme of every Surah from Al-Fatiha to An-Nas.

title: Basis of Fiqh
description: A draft covering the foundations and sources of Islamic jurisprudence.

title: Jewels of the Qur'an: Gems of Guidance from the Thirty Juz' — Volume II: Pathways of Divine Wisdom (Juz' 16–30)
description: Ten powerful insights from each Juz of the second half of the Quran, illuminating the moral architecture and divine wisdom of Juz 16–30.

title: The Seerah of the Prophet (PBUH)
description: A draft exploration of the life and character of the Prophet (PBUH), covering his tolerance, humility, forgiveness, and enduring legacy.
